agent_guarantees.name: audit_envelope_attached
agent_guarantees.proof: audit_envelope object with all required fields populated

agent_guarantees.description: agent has not exceeded execution quotas
agent_guarantees.name: within_quota

agent_guarantees.description: agent is within concurrent execution limit
agent_guarantees.name: within_concurrency
agent_guarantees.proof: active execution count below concurrency limit

agent_guarantees.description: agent holds the required capability binding
agent_guarantees.name: capability_bound
agent_guarantees.proof: capability_binding record exists and is ACTIVE

agent_guarantees.description: policy decision was made by different identity than agent
agent_guarantees.name: not_self_approving

agent_to_treasury.description: Treasury receives commands from Agent that carry the full audit envelope. Agent does not bypass any pipeline stage.

governance_to_agent.description: Governance approves agents and can override agent decisions. Agent executes within governance-approved boundaries.

governance_to_all_domains.description: Governance has oversight authority over all domains. Domains must report escalation events to Governance.

governance_to_identity.description: Governance manages capabilities through Identity. Identity enforces capability grants and revocations.

governance_to_ledger.description: Governance can query the complete audit trail and verify ledger integrity. Ledger provides immutable evidence to Governance.

governance_to_policy.description: Governance modifies and approves policy rules. Policy enforces governance decisions. Governance receives escalation notifications.

governance_to_treasury.description: Governance can halt treasury operations, block transactions, and review financial state during emergency situations.

identity_to_policy.description: Policy depends on Identity for authorization context before any evaluation can occur.

identity_guarantees.description: identity_id maps to an ACTIVE actor with valid session
identity_guarantees.name: actor_authenticated
identity_guarantees.proof: identity lookup confirms actor.state == ACTIVE and session valid

identity_guarantees.description: trust_level is set and binding_strength verified
identity_guarantees.name: trust_level_established
identity_guarantees.proof: trust assessment record exists and is current

identity_guarantees.description: effective capabilities computed from identity + delegation chain
identity_guarantees.name: capability_set_computed
identity_guarantees.proof: capability computation result with full provenance

identity_guarantees.description: all delegations in chain are ACTIVE and within limits
identity_guarantees.name: delegation_chain_valid
identity_guarantees.proof: chain traversal confirms every link is ACTIVE and not exceeded

identity_guarantees.description: session has not expired and has not been revoked
identity_guarantees.name: session_active
identity_guarantees.proof: session record confirms not_expired and not_revoked

identity_to_treasury.description: Treasury depends on Identity for actor verification before processing transfers.

identity_guarantees.description: actor has ownership or transfer authority for the asset
identity_guarantees.name: ownership_verified
identity_guarantees.proof: ownership record confirms full_control or transfer_control

intent_to_agent.description: Agent depends on Intent for a fully validated command with complete authorization chain.

intent_guarantees.description: intent has passed validation (state == READY or CONVERTED_TO_COMMAND)
intent_guarantees.name: intent_validated

intent_guarantees.description: policy_decision_id with ALLOW decision is present
intent_guarantees.name: policy_approval_attached
intent_guarantees.proof: linked policy_decision exists with decision == ALLOW

intent_guarantees.description: full authorization context from Identity is linked
intent_guarantees.name: authorization_context_attached
intent_guarantees.proof: authorization_context_id references a valid context record

intent_guarantees.description: converted command has all required fields
intent_guarantees.name: command_fully_specified
intent_guarantees.proof: command schema validation passes with no missing required fields

intent_guarantees.description: all ambiguities explicitly resolved with enrichment records
intent_guarantees.name: ambiguity_resolved
intent_guarantees.proof: no unresolved ambiguity records; all have resolution records

audit_requires_from_ledger.description: Time range with start and end

ledger_to_audit.description: Governance/Audit depends on Ledger for the complete, immutable financial truth.

ledger_guarantees.description: all journal entries are append-only and never modified
ledger_guarantees.name: journal_immutability
ledger_guarantees.proof: no UPDATE or DELETE operations on journal entries; only INSERT

ledger_guarantees.description: every journal entry is balanced (debits == credits)
ledger_guarantees.name: double_entry_integrity

ledger_guarantees.description: every financial event has a corresponding journal entry
ledger_guarantees.name: event_completeness
ledger_guarantees.proof: every financial event correlates to at least one journal entry

ledger_guarantees.description: all entries are queryable by identity_id, time range, asset_id, transaction_id
ledger_guarantees.name: audit_trail_queryable
ledger_guarantees.proof: query interface supports all filter dimensions

ledger_guarantees.description: reconciliation status is available for any time period
ledger_guarantees.name: reconciliation_state
ledger_guarantees.proof: reconciliation records exist for requested time range

policy_to_intent.description: Intent depends on Policy for a decision before normalization can proceed.

policy_guarantees.description: policy evaluation has produced a decision
policy_guarantees.name: evaluation_completed
policy_guarantees.proof: policy_result record exists with non-null decision

policy_guarantees.name: decision_deterministic
policy_guarantees.proof: deterministic_hash computed over all inputs matches stored hash

policy_guarantees.description: risk level and factors are computed
policy_guarantees.name: risk_assessed
policy_guarantees.proof: risk assessment record with level and factor breakdown

policy_guarantees.name: compliance_checked
policy_guarantees.proof: compliance evaluation record with per-rule results

policy_to_treasury.description: Treasury depends on Policy for execution permission and risk evaluation before any transfer.

policy_guarantees.description: Policy has evaluated and approved this transfer
policy_guarantees.name: execution_permission

policy_guarantees.description: Transfer complies with all active regulations
policy_guarantees.name: compliance_check

treasury_to_ledger.description: Treasury depends on Ledger to record the financial interpretation of every value movement. Ledger provides the authoritative record; Treasury provides the operation context.

failure_protocol.constitutional_note: Treasury may proceed if Vault confirms value exists. Ledger recording catches up. This respects the priority ordering: asset_security (2) > ledger_integrity (4).

ledger_returns_to_treasury.description: The journal entry_id that records this transfer
ledger_returns_to_treasury.name: journal_reference

ledger_returns_to_treasury.description: Confirmation that the entry was posted and balanced
ledger_returns_to_treasury.name: posting_confirmation

ledger_returns_to_treasury.description: Whether this transfer's ledger entry has been reconciled
ledger_returns_to_treasury.name: reconciliation_state

treasury_provides_to_ledger.description: The purpose and context of the value movement
treasury_provides_to_ledger.name: transfer_intent

treasury_provides_to_ledger.description: The source of the value movement
treasury_provides_to_ledger.name: source_account

treasury_provides_to_ledger.description: The destination of the value movement
treasury_provides_to_ledger.name: destination_account

treasury_provides_to_ledger.description: Whether the transfer completed, failed, or is pending
treasury_provides_to_ledger.name: settlement_status

treasury_to_payment.description: Payment domain depends on Treasury for approved execution instructions with Vault-backed value guarantees.
payment_returns_to_treasury: settlement confirmation or failure or unknown state

treasury_guarantees.description: Transfer has passed all authorization gates
treasury_guarantees.name: approved_execution_instruction

treasury_guarantees.description: Value is locked in Vault for this specific payment
treasury_guarantees.name: vault_backed_value

treasury_guarantees.description: The asset type and amount are policy-approved
treasury_guarantees.name: authorized_asset_movement
treasury_guarantees.proof: policy evaluation passed for this specific transfer

treasury_guarantees.description: If settlement fails, a compensation saga is defined
treasury_guarantees.name: compensation_path_exists

vault_to_ledger.description: Ledger depends on Vault for authoritative asset state when recording financial events. The Ledger records the truth — the Vault is the authority on current state.

failure_protocol.description: Ledger records the entry in PENDING state rather than rejecting it. This preserves the operation while Vault state is clarified. Constitution INV-009 requires unknown states be explicit.

vault_guarantees.description: Vault provides authoritative asset state at the moment an event occurs
vault_guarantees.name: asset_state_at_time_of_event

vault_guarantees.description: The balance before a financial operation was applied
vault_guarantees.name: balance_before_operation
vault_guarantees.proof: computed from event log and current projections

vault_guarantees.description: Status of any reservation related to the ledger entry
vault_guarantees.name: reservation_status

vault_guarantees.description: Reference to the latest custody attestation for the asset
vault_guarantees.name: custody_attestation_reference

vault_to_ledger_reverse.description: Ledger depends on Vault for asset state snapshots when recording financial events. This is the Ledger's view of the same contract defined in vault_to_ledger above.

failure_protocol.constitutional_note: INV-009 requires unknown state be explicit

ledger_requires_from_vault.description: asset_id for every asset referenced in postings
correlation_id linking to the originating operation

vault_guarantees_to_ledger.description: The asset referenced in the journal entry exists and is verified
vault_guarantees_to_ledger.name: asset_exists
vault_guarantees_to_ledger.proof: vault.asset.verified event exists for this asset_id

vault_guarantees_to_ledger.description: The actor posting to the ledger has ownership/control of the asset
vault_guarantees_to_ledger.name: ownership_verified

vault_guarantees_to_ledger.description: If the entry references a valuation, a trusted valuation exists
vault_guarantees_to_ledger.name: valuation_reference_exists

vault_guarantees_to_ledger.description: If the entry references a reservation, the reservation is in a valid state
vault_guarantees_to_ledger.name: reservation_reference_valid
vault_guarantees_to_ledger.proof: vault.reserve state matches the entry's expected state

vault_to_payment.description: Payment domain depends on Vault for value confirmation before executing external settlement. No payment leaves SOVR without Vault confirmation.

payment_requires_from_vault.description: Which external rail will execute the payment

vault_guarantees.description: Value has been locked specifically for this payment
vault_guarantees.name: value_locked_for_payment
vault_guarantees.proof: reservation in ACTIVE state with consuming_transaction_id matching payment

vault_guarantees.description: The asset backing this payment is confirmed locked
vault_guarantees.name: asset_exists_in_locked_state
vault_guarantees.proof: asset state is LOCKED with matching lock

vault_guarantees.description: The payment initiator has authority to move this asset
vault_guarantees.name: ownership_confirmed

vault_to_policy.description: Policy engine depends on Vault for asset context when evaluating rules. The policy engine cannot make correct decisions without knowing the current Vault state.

failure_protocol.description: If Vault is unavailable, the policy engine defaults to DENY for any operation requiring vault state. This implements the constitutional principle that uncertainty blocks action (INV-009).

vault_guarantees.description: The current state of the asset being evaluated
vault_guarantees.name: current_asset_state

vault_guarantees.description: The available balance for the actor on this asset
vault_guarantees.name: available_balance

vault_guarantees.description: Active reservations for this actor and asset
vault_guarantees.name: reserve_status

vault_guarantees.description: Active collateral positions for this actor
vault_guarantees.name: collateral_positions

vault_guarantees.description: The risk classification of the asset
vault_guarantees.name: risk_classification

vault_to_treasury.description: Treasury depends on Vault to confirm that value exists and is available before initiating any movement. This is the most critical coupling contract in SOVR — it ensures no value moves that doesn't exist.

treasury_requires_from_vault.description: Unique identifier for the locked reservation
The intent that originated this operation

vault_guarantees.description: The asset is in a verified or higher operational state
vault_guarantees.name: asset_exists_and_verified

vault_guarantees.description: Value has been reserved and locked for this specific operation
vault_guarantees.name: reservation_created_and_locked
vault_guarantees.proof: reservation exists in ACTIVE state with matching lock_id

vault_guarantees.description: The actor has sufficient available balance for this operation
vault_guarantees.name: available_balance_confirmed
vault_guarantees.proof: balance.available_balance >= requested_amount at time of reservation

vault_guarantees.description: The actor has transfer authority over this asset
vault_guarantees.name: ownership_authority_confirmed
vault_guarantees.proof: actor_id has full_control or transfer_control on asset.ownership_id
vault_guarantees.verification: vault_service checks ownership and control records

vault_guarantees.description: A unique lock_id is provided to prevent double-spending
vault_guarantees.name: lock_id_provided_for_deduplication
vault_guarantees.proof: lock_id is globally unique and tied to a single reservation
